title: cafitac/hermit-agent
summary: Run Claude Code 50–80% cheaper. Hermit is an MCP executor with Codex-first auto routing (codex → z.ai → local), so Claude stays the orchestrator while cheaper models do the heavy lifting.

title: xxFOLDxx/boot.init
summary: Linux boot automation workspace with systemd services, desktop autostart, shell scripts, cron jobs, init scripts, and config samples to start apps at boot 🐙.

title: Senzo13/JoyBoy
summary: Local AI harness/workstation: local AI image editor, Ollama image generation routing, SDXL inpainting UI, CivitAI model imports, 8GB VRAM Stable Diffusion.

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: Visual Builder for AI Workflows and Agents

title: hydrahive/hydrahive
summary: A hive for your AI agents. Personal per user, shared per project, self-hosted, 24/7. Assistants that outlive your laptop's uptime.

title: tsunamayo7/helix-agent
summary: Extend Claude Code with local Ollama models — autonomous ReAct agent with auto-routing, local benchmarks, and file tools

title: Ahta14/zeroshot-reasoning
summary: Explore zero-shot reasoning strategies with Ollama in this interactive FastAPI project. Visualize AI thought processes using Chain, Tree, and Graph-of-Thought. 🌟💻

title: LaurentPointCa/photo-snail
summary: Local-first AI that describes and tags every photo in your macOS Photos library. Fully on-device via Ollama.

summary: Get Ollama models from the Ollama library website (https://ollama.com/library) in JSON format.

summary: WOTANN — The All-Father of AI agent harnesses. One install. Every model. Every channel. Full autonomy.

title: Haidzai/claude-code-proxy
summary: Monitor and visualize your Claude Code API interactions with Claude Code Proxy. Easily set up a transparent proxy and live dashboard. 🛠️🚀

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: Kakz/prometheus-llm
summary: PrometheusLLM is a unique transformer architecture inspired by dignity and recursion. This project aims to explore new frontiers in AI research and welcomes contributions from the community. 🐙🌟

title: SonPari1/Search-Engine-Ui

title: drhalto/memexmcp
summary: Local semantic + keyword search over your codebases and documents, served to Claude (or any MCP client) over MCP.

summary: A minimal take on OpenClaw using Ollama

title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
